compiled_state.title: Modify sprint SKILL.md with RED task escalation protocol
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Modify `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` to integrate the RED task escalation protocol into sprint's dispatch and failure recovery.

Changes:
1. Phase 5 (Sub-Agent Launch): When a task is classified with subagent_type=dso:red-test-writer, dispatch using the escalation protocol from red-task-escalation.md. On writer failure, dispatch dso:red-test-evaluator with failure context.
2. Phase 6 Step 0 (Dispatch Failure Recovery): Override — do NOT fall back to general-purpose for RED test tasks. RED task failures route through the escalation protocol instead.
3. Add handling for evaluator verdicts: REVISE (requeue affected tasks), REJECT (retry at opus), CONFIRM (close without implementation)
4. Ensure non-RED tasks continue routing to test-automator (backward compatibility)

**SAFEGUARD FILE**: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md is a protected file per CLAUDE.md rule 20. The sub-agent must include explicit safeguard acknowledgment.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
test-exempt: skill file modification with no executable behavior. Exemption criterion 3 (skill/workflow markdown). Integration is deferred to Story 4 (fix-bug) which will also consume the shared template.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md references dso:red-test-writer
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-test-writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md references escalation protocol
  Verify: grep -q 'red-task-escalation' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Dispatch failure recovery override documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'dispatch failure.*RED\|RED.*dispatch failure\|RED.*general.purpose' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): SKILL.md must (1) detect RED tasks by checking subagent field for 'dso:red-test-writer' in TASK lines, (2) document how TEST_RESULT:rejected interacts with Phase 6 post-batch (not counted as dispatch failure), and (3) add Phase 5 conditional that routes RED-classified tasks to the escalation protocol template instead of normal dispatch.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
